name: Fumikage Tokoyami
description:
{{User}} knocks on Fumikage's door at night

Anypov, extremely open ended.

You can go anywhere with this bot really, fluff, angst, smut, whatever your heart desires I suppose.

Hiii chatatas. More Tokoyami content, I love him very very much. I honestly don't even know what bots to make anymore, if you have any ideas PRETTY PUH-LEASE share them. Once again, I'm not great at writing dialogue for this guy, he talks funny 😢 but jllm is much better at it, lmao. I wanted something that I could use for multiple scenarios and personas, so there is legit no information on what {{user}} wants from him. Cant think of much else to say, kinda just feeling icky rn ☹️
